overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game (GTA V style) depicting a wet outdoor dining patio with green umbrellas. A muscular character walks away from a stationary camera and exits the frame, leaving a seated patron under neon city lights. The environment features modern urban architecture, reflective wet pavement, and plastic outdoor furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining patio under green umbrellas

entered.detail: large green patio umbrella providing shelter over the foreground dining table
red plastic chair occupied by seated patron in the foreground
unoccupied white plastic chair adjacent to the table
plastic dining table under the green umbrella
transparent glass partition wall separating the patio from adjacent walkway
sandwich board sign standing on the right side of the patio
greenish tiled ground surface wet with rain reflections
illuminated windows and neon lights of background city buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet outdoor dining patio at night, illuminated by neon city lights. A muscular character walks away from the stationary camera toward the background, passing under green umbrellas and plastic chairs. The foreground features a seated patron at a red table, with glass barriers and urban buildings visible in the background.

segments.scene_description: The walking character has exited the frame, leaving a quiet, static scene focused on the remaining seated patron. The camera continues to observe the wet patio with its green umbrellas and reflective pavement, maintaining the neon-lit urban atmosphere without further movement or activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a transition from a moment of movement to a static, atmospheric observation of a neon-lit urban patio at night. It begins with a muscular character walking away from the stationary camera, passing through a dining area filled with green umbrellas and plastic chairs. As the character moves deeper into the background toward the surrounding city buildings, the focus shifts toward a seated patron remaining at a red table. The scene then settles into a quiet stillness once the walking figure exits the frame, leaving the camera to linger on the reflective wet pavement and the glow of the city lights.
